examples: There was no waking up even for those imbecilic men who had fallen asleep under her ear, inside the pillow.
Another reform: Correct the equally imbecilic shortcomings of Flexible Spending Accounts (FSAs).
Time, it turns out, weighs just as heavily on Masha, the aging egotist, who swans in with Spike (the excellent Billy Magnussen), an imbecilic Adonis.
